source.role: common BF16 quantization source only; never scored as an arm

reap.implementation_role: method provenance; the frozen public REAP50 mask is recovered without loading its quantized experts into scored artifacts
reap.reference_role: mask donor only; retained router rows are matched to pinned BF16 original ids and confirmed by correction bias
reap.mask_recovery: nearest 8-bit MLX router row to BF16 source row, one-to-one, minimum 10x nearest/second-nearest RMSE margin, exact correction-bias match

arms.name: plain_reap_mix_quant
arms.tiers: 48 least-used original-bank experts Q2_K; remaining 48 NVFP4

arms.name: mix_quant
arms.tiers: hottest 25% NVFP4; middle 50% Q3_K; coldest 25% Q2_K

arms.name: mix_quant_prune25
arms.tiers: hottest 25% NVFP4; next 25% Q3_K; next 25% Q2_K; coldest 25% pruned

arms.name: traffic_mix_quant
arms.tiers: hottest 16 Q8_0; next 37 NVFP4; next 73 Q2_K; coldest 66 pruned
arms.role: promoted follow-up from the frozen five-arm N=1 directional screen
